The legendary script. So just a quick tidbit on this script. This script was developed between me and Nick Elliott. He was the number two salesperson at Six Pack Shortcuts, which did a million dollars a month in sales. He had a 75 person team when he was there. He was number two. Amazing, amazing closer. He also now runs the entire, at least the time of this recording, he runs the entire Legiboss phone sales team, which at this point I think he's got 40. 40 person call team already to him and they're calling email opt-ins to upsell different types of things. And so he's a phenomenal closer. We adapted my script that I use at my gyms with his phone script to make this script and it's unbelievable. It's really, really good. So like enjoy. Okay, so here's the call structure. There's really six pieces to it. The open is really just getting their attention, making sure that we can grab them so that we can actually have the conversation. Second piece is discovery, which is finding out more about them and expanding the gap between where they are and where they want to go. Because if you don't have a gap, then you have no bridge to offer as a solution. Okay, after that, after we go through the discovery process, we'll be like, awesome, you know, I think it might be a good fit, which would be the transition to the pitch, the pitch itself, which is a three pillar pitch of what, you know, what we're going to be providing. After that, it's going to be the commitments that we require from them in the program, which is more of a prescriptive close. And then finally, the actual close itself to nail it down. I will note a lot of these sales, they don't need to be super long. You'll notice in the examples live recordings that we have, they're 10, 20 minutes. A lot of them you can you can knock these out in 15, like it's a very straightforward sale. It's a straight line sale, just follow the structure, and you'll be good to go. So let's dive in. All right, to the open, you're like, Hey, Rosie, it's your name, right with CrossFit 123, signed up for our program, six week transformation, 28 day belly fat blast, whatever, on whatever traffic source it came from. A lot of you guys are using Facebook ads. So program on Facebook, when did they do it 10 minutes ago, an hour ago, yesterday, how's it going? So it'd be like, Hey, Rosie, it's Alex with Costa Brown, you set up for a six week transformation program on Facebook a couple days ago, how's it going? Right. And so notice here is you want to have tonality. And when you say the name in the beginning, you don't want to say, is this so and so, that's crap, I'll know that you're like marketing to them, right? So you're gonna be like, Hey, Rosie, and then like, you can pause for a second. And they're like, Yeah, like it's Alex, you can notice the tonality goes up, like as though they should know who you are, right? And you'd be like, with CrossFit Power, you signed up for a six week, you know, program on Facebook just a couple days ago. And they're like, Oh, right. So each one of these I'm ending my tonality with an upward swing. Hey, Rosie, it's Alex, right? With CrossFit Power, like, don't you hear me? Like you set up for a six week challenge on Facebook a couple days ago, you see how my voice is going up at the end. When you're doing that, it draws them in because they're thinking, why should I know this? Because you're asking it as a question, okay, without actually asking a question. Does that make sense? Okay, really important because if you hook this right, you've got four seconds in the beginning to gain someone's attention. Alright, so make sure that you nail that. You're like, awesome, how's it going? They're like, good, great. And one of the transformation coaches here across from Bower at our location, you say what location it is, even if you only have one, because it makes it appear like you have more. Alright, so it makes it seem a little bit more legit from a business standpoint. So you're like, I'm here at our L'Hopper location. Okay, I'm not going to take a bunch of time. I got a lot of applications to get through today. I do want to check in and see what it was that motivated you center for the program. You're trying to gain muscle, burn belly fat. Alright, important. They're lost in time. They'll be like, both, like, got it. Or I see, right? You're like, okay, cool. Let me just get a couple of facts about you. So what's your age? What's your height? What's your weight? What's your goal weight? Write all this stuff down. You should have this stuff. This is your ammunition. So you want to increase size or increase muscle tone. We're like, okay, they'll say both most of the times, right? Sometimes they won't say this, the size part. So where will you buy it? I like to see more definition. Okay, so we're looking to, and then XYZ. So we're like, so we're looking to trim up your arms and your legs. Is that correct? Okay, cool. That's a great physique, cool. So affirm them. Alright, it's absolutely worth fighting for. So just to make sure you get the right attention, I want to get a feel for your training skill level. When was the last time you trained consistently three to four times a week for more than six months consecutively? Most people are going to be like, never, right? I'm like, okay, got it. Totally understand. So we're probably going to start you out with three days a week. But before I get into that, where do you carry most of your belly fat? Front, back or side. So right now, I'm right after that little paragraph. Where do you carry most of your belly fat? Front, back, or side. This question is killer. I'm telling you, like, if you get one thing from the sales training, add this question to your sales. Okay, great. So now is it enough to pinch or is it enough to grab a handful? Alright, now you're going to hear people rustle around the phone, like you're going to hear them crinkling, like trying to figure out what it is, because we're like, oh, it's mostly in the front. And you're like, okay, cool. Is it enough to pinch or is it enough to grab a handful? And then they're going to tell you. And so they're sitting there with their hand on their fat, it makes the pain visceral. Okay, so this is a great info. Would you say it's one to two inches or it's more than that, right? And then, like, or whatever it is. So like, now would you say it's one to two inches or you can grab a handful? I think we've actually changed this, but either way, it works fine. Okay, so since this is where most of your fat is, and where you've been struggling the most, how long you've been struggling with this fat? Fat is still in their hand. They're going to be like, I don't know, my whole life. So why haven't you taken care of it since you want to? Boom, hard question, right? So they're going to give you the reasons of why they haven't done it, blah, blah, blah, blah, blah, that's going to be there. They're like, I can't be held accountable. I don't know what to eat. I don't know how to work out, etc. Right? Awesome. So whatever, whatever they say, it doesn't matter because they're going to be, we're going to use that to qualify for the program. Like that makes you just like the people who've best fit for the program. So whether it's somebody who doesn't know how to train, doesn't know how to eat, it can't be held accountable. Whatever it is, it's going to be something that makes them a good fit of the program because it should hopefully, right? For you. So like, awesome, Rosie, it makes you just like the people who are best fit for this program. So this is what we're going to do. Right now, you're 260 and you want to get to 200, right? Now we've helped a thousand people or whatever number it is for you. I don't know how many clients you've had lifetime, but you can look look it up in your CRM like how many clients you've had at your gym. So you've helped a thousand people just like you accomplish the health goals and given the fact of where you're at right now, I can tell you that we can help you get to X in six weeks. Okay? Notice you have to say help. You can't say we're going to get you to this. Otherwise, you're making promises and claims and whatnot. So just make sure that you say we help you get to where you want to go in six weeks. Okay? Would you be okay with that? Is that still a reasonable goal? You're not going to be upset with me? Haha. Like make that joke and lighten the tone. And they're like, I won't be upset with you. Like, awesome. Fantastic. Okay, mind if I tell you how we're going to make this happen for you? Okay. Yes. Right. So they're going to they're going to invite you to sell them. All right. So now we're now we're entering the pitch. So that was their transition that we just went through. Awesome. That makes you just like the people who fit for the program. I know we don't get from here to here. So we're recapping the goal. We've helped people just like you. I think I can help you get to this in six weeks. Would you be okay with that? Can can I tell it? Can I sell you now? They say yes. Okay. Cool. Fantastic. So here's what we're going to do to get you from 280 to 260 and burning burn the belly fat that's located here. All right. We have a three pillar approach to how we do body transformations, fit, nutrition, accountability and unfortunately most of the programs that are out there focus on just one thing. For instance, Jenny Craig, right? Jenny Craig will help you give a diet, but it's not going to cover fitness or accountability or say you sign up for a gym membership. Like maybe you've done in the past, they don't give you anything, right? It's and the only accountability they provide you is when they call you for the credit card for your gym payment because your car didn't go through, right? No diet, nothing. Ha ha ha. Okay. So see someone's always missing something. They don't have all three and that's why we're successful is because we have all three and when you have all three you can't fail. Does that make sense? Yes. Great. So this is kind of the second half of the pitch. So you're explaining why they haven't been successful in the past and why are they going to be successful now which is kind of the commitments that they're going to be making. Okay. This is prescriptive. So here's what you should commit to. Can you work out here three days a week, four days a week, whatever it is for your program at our facility with a coach? We'll coach you through everything. Yes. Great. We got morning times and afternoon times. What are you thinking? They'll tell you and then tell them the times, right? Great. We started as early as 5am. We won earlier at 9am. Can you fit in between there? Yes. Great. Okay. Second component is nutrition. Our nutrition plan is so easy. I've had a 12 year old do it and someone who doesn't even speak English. So I'm confident you can do it. I promise it's like a color coded plan. It's so simple. There's no way you can't follow it. So you're willing to change your food habits? Yes. Now mind you, we just pre frame the fact that of course they're going to be able to do it because we just said somebody who's 12 and somebody can't speak English can do it. So they're not going to say like, no, I don't think we'll be able to figure it out. All right. Great. Now with your training, nutrition is, sorry, now the key with your training and nutrition is consistency, which brings me to the third point. It's accountability, right? First, you're going to have your own accountability coach to sign you specifically. That's your point of contact, that's your fitness mentor. He or she's going to be with you all six weeks and you can check with me every week. Just so you have any questions, they're there for you. Does that make sense? Yes. Got it. Second, you're going to have XYZ support. You can use Facebook, you can use whatever where XYZ, we, you know, Vox or that's an app that we use, but you can use whatever you want. Now 90% of the battle is not when you're at the gym, it's when you're at home, right? And so this will give you access to us 24-7, 365. Ask questions, we'll be back to you as soon as possible. Okay. Make sense? Great. Okay. Third, you'll have VIP access to our private community, it's not just a coach you're getting, it's a family of like-minded individuals from the same journey as you and lifting you up along the way. So you hit your goal in record time. Now you'll connect with people who are starting and people who've already hit their goal. So you have both sides, people who are walking through with you and people who are cheering from the, from the, from the year goal line to help you cross. Does that make sense? Yes. Great. So that's how the program works, is step-by-step, don't-for-you system that'll get you from 280 to 200 and get rid of the five inches you have in the belly fat that's located on your side and do that as fast as possible. Does that make sense? Yes. Great. So my main question for you is, you win? And then you can either just wait or you can just follow the second piece off, which is the whole program across 299. Now you can change whatever that price. I put these little boxes there so you can edit it. So it's like the whole program across 299. You can do that three payments in 97. All we ask for on the phone is to hold a spot to make sure you're serious. It's a $97 down payment. All right. This way we can print out your mail plan, get all the material you need ahead of time, and you arrive at the gym. Excited, ready to rock and roll, and it's all laid out for you. All right. The only thing you need to do is show up in follow directions. Sound good? Okay. Did you get our, so did you want to get your down payment 97 on Visa or MasterCard? Here's a pro tip. Stormers sales people, you can obviously go higher than 299. Like I said, this can be 0 to 599. For people who haven't done a lot of phone sales, start at 299. All right. And then you can do the $97 down payment and you're good to go. All right. Stormers sales people don't need to offer the payment plan. You can only offer it as a down self. Someone starts stronger. All right. Now, if you have someone who's obviously stronger than the phone, one of the things that you can do is you can just say like, hey, if you want, you can save some money today. If you want to pay in full today, it's $247. Save 50 bucks. Right? It's one way to do it. And you can do that at any other price point. So if it's three payments of $133, if it's $399 instead of $299, you say, listen, it's $347. Save 50 bucks today if you want it's painful. Right? It's an easy thing if you feel like you have a good report with the person. All right. Now, you should already have a copy of my book if you're going through this. But I just want to cover one obstacle. The book has a zillion other obstacle overcomes, but one since this phone sales. I don't give my part of the phone. Here's the obstacle overcome works I think very well. Report wins worse. So having humor is really important. So it's like, Rosie, totally get it. I'll tell you, I'll tell you this to make you feel better. If I were trying to get your card, I would not have told you a $400 price point. I would have said it was free and then that it was going to start billing you in two months or something. Or I wouldn't charge you for a $10 program. Right? So like, I promise that's not my intention. But since it does come up, sometimes here's my additional clatterin for you. Most of the people, the scammers from Uganda, try and get people to wire money since credit card comes to protect from crazies on the internet. And they just take the money back. Right? So I promise you have nothing to worry about real people. I'm afraid of birds. I have cat named Billy and I live right off the corner of 61 and 27 and 7-11. All right. So you're just showing that you're a real person. You're putting a landmark that they probably recognize if they're local. So what card do you want to use the whole spot? So you go right back to the close, right? If they're like, ah, I'm not really sure. I might say, like, do I have to give my card? Like, yeah. And like, this is one of the best overcomes ever. It sounds so simple. Yeah, this is always how we've done it. Like, I'm telling you, like, that works a lot. We've only, you know, we only have 20 spots and we prepare materials ahead of time. So we're actually incurring costs just before we even start. Speaking of which, what is your t-shirt size? So what is size for you? And then they tell you, it's kind of like a micro commitment. You're like, awesome. So what card do I use? Right? So it's like, they've almost like, purchased the t-shirt when you say that. Okay. So that's just like a follow up. And like, do I have to, you hit them with that most times when people overcome it, drop the card, close the sale. All right. That is the legendary phone script. It works unbelievably well. Just follow it. Just follow it. Read it a bunch of times. Get familiar with the words. Literally, you can just walk someone through it and you will crush this. Okay. It's really good.
